description: Gate rules auto-generated from contract/v2.8.0.json. R1-R7 mapped to executable checks.

commit_binding.description: All proof/audit artifacts must carry commit SHA. Artifacts from different commits are STALE.

R3.name: Proof Authenticity
R3.description: Proof must be CI-generated, not PR-submitted
R3.check: verification_report.json exists AND commit matches HEAD

R4.name: Full Execution Requirement
R4.description: All baseline tests must pass (226 passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored)
R4.check: cargo test exited 0 AND test_counts match baseline

R7.name: CI Workflow Integrity
R7.description: CI workflow files cannot be modified by PR

SQL_SEMANTIC_TEST.description: SQL/executor changes require NULL and JOIN tests (text check only; CI is ground truth)
SQL_SEMANTIC_TEST.check: changed_files contains executor|parser|planner|storage → NULL tests exist
SQL_SEMANTIC_TEST.disclaimer: Semantic correctness is verified by CI, not by this gate

ROADMAP_PRIORITY.description: Block P1/P2 PRs when P0 issues are incomplete
ROADMAP_PRIORITY.check: pr_labels contains P1|P2 AND docs/roadmap.json has unfinished P0

TEST_COMPLETENESS.description: Code PRs must include happy-path, edge-case, regression tests (text check only; CI is ground truth)
TEST_COMPLETENESS.disclaimer: Test quality is verified by CI, not by this gate

json_integrity.description: Report files must be valid JSON

architecture.description: Gate v0.3: Contract-driven + Commit-bound + Auto-trigger Audit. Gate reads contract/v2.8.0.json to dynamically generate R1-R7 checks. All artifacts must carry current HEAD commit SHA.
layers: hermes_gate.sh (gate, reads contract.json, enforces R1-R7 + hygiene)
